user.title: RFLink Streamer Gateway
user.description: Connect to your RFLink TCP stream (e.g. ESPHome serial-to-TCP bridge)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect. Please check host and port.

abort.already_configured: This RFLink gateway is already configured.

error.invalid_aliases: Alias lines must use raw_id=logical_id format.

init.description: Set gateway behavior and optional filter text for the discovered-device list.

data.name: Name
data.auto_add_new_devices: Automatically add newly discovered device IDs
data.device_filter: Filter discovered IDs (raw ID, alias, platform, protocol)

devices.description: Review discovered RFLink IDs, choose which ones should appear in Home Assistant, and optionally map multiple raw IDs to one logical ID using one alias per line: raw_id=logical_id.

data.device_filter: Filter discovered IDs (change and submit to refresh list)
data.enabled_device_ids: Discovered IDs enabled in Home Assistant
